title: Matrix mod
body:
Minecraft mod inspired by the movie Matrix. Adds a separate world of events with its own game inventory. (_NOT COMPATIBLE WITH ADDITIONAL SLOTS MODS_). 

1 - Craft a chair

![[Chair Craft]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d45b26fd78c1c379212ffab1b2ff2c30c2b6a42a.jpeg)

2 - Use it

![[Using chair]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca98f78f4940cfe7db2543b39b7279dfd80f6145.jpeg)

3 - Welcome to the event world The first player to enter becomes the Matrix Architect (Rights can be transferred using the command)

 ![Event world](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3637b75532942e782c40bd250c09932fd01c0f74.jpeg)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/sm95QF9YgUY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
